name: engram-memory
description: Salience-gated memory plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: engram
plugins.description: Salience-gated memory — captures what matters, forgets what doesn't, consolidates patterns while sleeping. Unlike log-everything approaches, engram scores each observation on 5 dimensions (Surprise, Novelty, Arousal, Reward, Conflict) and only stores what's salient. Automatic context injection, confidence decay, and dream-cycle pattern extraction.
